product.name: Linear
product.description: Project management software for software teams

competitors.name: Jira
competitors.pricing_details: Free forever for 10 users, with paid upgrades available
features: Unlimited goals, projects, tasks, and forms
Multiple views (backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, summary)
strengths: Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management
Strong brand recognition with notable customers (e.g. NASA, Visa, Canva)
Robust feature set with automation and AI-powered capabilities
weaknesses: Potential complexity for small teams or simple projects
May require significant setup and configuration
competitors.market_position: Jira is a leading collaborative work management solution, recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant
competitors.target_audience: Jira targets a wide range of teams, including software development, marketing, IT, and project management teams of all sizes

competitors.name: Monday.com
competitors.pricing_details: Free plan available with unlimited time, paid plans start with 10 seats and offer yearly or monthly payment options with an 18% discount for yearly payments
strengths: All-in-one work platform with AI capabilities
Highly customizable with a wide range of templates and integrations
Scalable with a free plan available for small teams
weaknesses: Steep learning curve due to the wide range of features and customization options
Pricing may not be competitive for large teams or enterprises
Limited customer support options for free plan users
competitors.market_position: Monday.com is a leading work operating system that competes with other project management and team collaboration tools in the market
competitors.target_audience: Monday.com targets teams and organizations of all sizes across various industries, including marketing, software development, IT, and customer service

competitors.name: Asana
competitors.pricing_details: Free plan for personal projects, $10.99 per user per month billed annually for the Starter plan
strengths: AI-powered features for efficient work management
weaknesses: Limited features in the free plan
Pricing may not be competitive for large teams
Dependence on integrations for full functionality
competitors.market_position: Asana is a leading work management platform that combines human and AI collaboration to help teams achieve their goals
competitors.target_audience: Asana targets teams and organizations of all sizes, from individuals to large enterprises, across various industries including marketing, operations, IT, and leadership

competitors.name: Shortcut
competitors.market_position: Shortcut appears to be a project management and workflow automation tool competing in a crowded market with established players.
competitors.target_audience: Shortcut likely targets teams and organizations seeking to streamline their workflows and improve collaboration, although the specific target audience is not clearly defined.
